zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Uvedale於大約1309年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞迪千時，她的父親John De Uvedale II40歲，母親Isabel d' Etton31歲。她於大約1336年與Sir William d'Abernon在英國英格蘭素瑞斯托克 達阿波農結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年在英國英格蘭享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Uvedale was born about 1309, in Titsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Uvedale II, was 40 and her mother, Isabel d' Etton, was 31. She married Sir William d'Abernon about 1336, in Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1359, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

Elle a épousé Sir William d'Abernon environ 1336, à Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1359, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Uvedaleが約1309年にイギリスイギリススリーティトセイで生まれた時，父John De Uvedale IIは40歳，母Isabel d' Ettonは31歳であった。約1336年にイギリスイギリススリーストク ド'アバーノンでSir William d'Abernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年にイギリスイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Uvedale(이)가 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 티츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Uvedale II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel d' Etton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스토크 드'압른넌에서 Sir William d'Abernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Uvedale родилась около 1309 г. в местности тици, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Uvedale II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel d' Etton, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William d'Abernon около 1336 г. в местности сток д'абирнон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1359 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
